channel.title: Outreaches on IID Lab @ Yale
channel.description: Recent content in Outreaches on IID Lab @ Yale

item.title: Outreach
item.description: I have been very fortunate to advise the following freshmen students at Yale: Eric Duong Hristo Staykov Evelyn Huang Calvin Schwart Elizabeth Bays J Joseph Antonio Medina Madison Papir Kenia Hale Anthony Ji Greg Naratil Jason Kim Kenny Wang John Dallard Dan Shao Harshal Sheth Preston Smith Julia Robinson Mathematical Festival: In the last two years, and with the help of Yale’s Pathway to Science, I have co-organized Julia Robinson Mathematical festival at Yale.
